_note: Template for GC Function Data Actions. Copy this and fill in: name, statusId, and your OAuth credentials.
_instructions: 1. In GC Admin, add a 'Genesys Cloud Function' integration.
2. Upload update-workitem/index.js as a ZIP file. Set handler to: index.handler. Runtime: Node.js 20.
3. Import each data action JSON below into that integration.
4. In each imported action, update requestTemplate: replace YOUR_CLIENT_ID and YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET with the real values from your OAuth client (Client Credentials grant type).
5. In Scripter, add a Data Action button and select the appropriate action. Pass workitemId as the input.
name: ABC Retail - Set WI Status - [TRANSITION NAME]
